hot intro words for articles._comment: value for 'hot intro words for articles' key is an array of objects, each of them (except current comment object) contains two key-value pairs. First one: key - string 'phrase', value - string with phrase itself. Second one: key - string 'keep', value - boolean that means what to do with the phrase after first use: true -  to transfer to value of 'funny intro words for articles' key, false - to delete.
